closed_form_equation_v74.feature_term: K_f_v74 = K_f_v73 + K_f_v73 * A_prop * 0.004 + K_f_v73 * B_plastic_v18 * 0.001 + K_f_v73 * D_feature_v12 * 0.001
closed_form_equation_v74.structure_term: K_s_v74 = K_s_v73 + K_s_v73 * T_struct * 0.007 + K_s_v73 * B_struct_v18 * 0.004 + K_s_v73 * D_structure_v12 * 0.002
closed_form_equation_v74.learning_term: K_l_v74 = K_l_v73 + K_l_v73 * R_train_v18 + M_prop * 1000 + A_prop * 1000 + M_brain_direct_v12 * 1000

project_readout.summary: 第七十四版主核开始把破平台传播探针、脑编码第十二版直测链和训练终式第十八桥一起并回主核，使主核开始直接回答“松动迹象能不能真正传播”。
project_readout.next_question: 下一步要把这条主核推进到更大的可训练系统里，检验平台期松动是否真的开始传播。
